/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/SimpleBankSystem.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleBankSystem.dir/src/Account.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleBankSystem.dir/src/User.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleBankSystem.dir/src/Database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleBankSystem.dir/src/Application.cpp.o -o SimpleBankSystem  _deps/imgui-sfml-build/libImGui-SFML.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so
